depression.description: I feel like I'm stuck in my PhD work. The final stages seem so daunting that I can't even bring myself to tackle them.
Every time I see my colleagues working longer hours and getting published, I can't help but feel like I'm not good enough. It makes me question my abilities and worth.
I often ruminate about my perceived failures. It feels like I'm trapped in this cycle of thinking that I'll never be as successful as others.

depression.topic: Fear of failure in my career
depression.description: I have this constant fear that if I don't achieve something significant, it means I'm a failure. It's paralyzing and makes it hard to work.
Painting helps me manage my stress, but I worry that I'm using it as a distraction instead of facing my work challenges head-on.
